They face forward toward the camera.

Setting:
The background is softly blurred and shows an indoor environment with muted colors, including brown tones and light highlights. The lighting appears even and bright, with no visible outdoor weather.

Visual Details:
The hair has distinct straight bangs and layered strands, with some darker shadowed sections. The eyes have a glossy anime look with dark outlines and bright highlights. The person wears a light-colored garment with blue accents, including a visible blue collar or inner layer and dark trim around the edges of the outfit. The cup/mug is held with both hands; the left hand and fingers are visible wrapping around the cup, while the right hand is positioned closer to the front. The camera angle is straight-on and tightly framed, focusing attention on the face and cup.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows an anime-style character holding a light-colored cup near their face. The character looks forward with a neutral expression against a softly blurred indoor background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
